title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking - Don't Allow - Enable now - Ask [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Verify that tapping "Don't Allow" on the initial location permission prompt and later tapping "Enable Now" from Find My Device correctly triggers subsequent permission dialogs with appropriate options.
steps: Select 'Ask Next Time or When I Share' in Location Services
expected: Various permission dialogs appear at different stages with options including "Allow Once", "Allow While Using App", and "Don't Allow".
